name: bedrock-models
description: Amazon Bedrock — chat (Converse API), embedding (Titan/Cohere), image generation (Nova Canvas), video generation (Nova Reel), and speech-to-text. One instance per AWS profile/region; authentication uses your AWS credential chain — no key is stored by PersonalClaw.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: AWS Region
x-meta.help: Bedrock region (e.g. us-east-1). Credentials come from your AWS environment / profile — no key is stored here.

x-meta.label: AWS Profile
x-meta.help: Optional named profile from ~/.aws. Empty uses the default credential chain (env / SSO / instance role). Add a second instance with a different profile to use another AWS account.

x-meta.label: Default Chat Model
x-meta.help: Bedrock chat model id (full versioned id). Empty = resolved from live Bedrock discovery (Claude preferred).

x-meta.label: System Prompt
x-meta.help: Optional system prompt prepended to every chat turn.

x-meta.label: Video S3 Bucket
x-meta.help: S3 bucket for Nova Reel video-generation output. Falls back to the BEDROCK_VIDEO_S3_BUCKET env var. Required only for video generation.
